citation: Oracle Am., Inc. v. Google Inc., No. C 10-03561 WHA, 2016 WL 3181206 (N.D. Cal. June 8, 2016)
notes: DATE-GAP GUARD for the one-sided RECAP temporal gate (Tier 1 Step 2 Lever 1). Docket filed 2010-08-12 (date_filed = case filing date), cited opinion issued 2016 -- a 6-year gap. Resolves VERIFIED_VIA_RECAP. A naive symmetric +/-5yr gate on the RECAP path would see filing year 2010 vs cited 2016 and WRONGLY reject this real citation. The gate must be one-sided (reject only cited < filing - tolerance, never cited > filing). See docs/retrospectives/2026-06-10-tier1-step1-measurement.md. Verified live under v0.3 2026-06-09.

citation: Moore v. Hillman, No. 4:06-CV-43, 2006 WL 1313880 (W.D. Mich. May 12, 2006)
